text: Reminder: bus for the Oak Mountain XC invite leaves Crestwood at 6:45 AM sharp Saturday. Be early or be left. Bring layers, it's cold up there.
I've got the meet entries finalized and the tent loaded. Sprinters lift Friday afternoon then we travel.
Coach I'll be there at 6:30. Trying to get a good warmup in before we load up.
That's the mindset Devon. Early is on time. See everybody Saturday. Get your sleep tonight.
Christmas dinner is at 2 like always. Shannon you're on the smoked turkey. Keisha bring the mac and greens. Marcus, ice and drinks.
Turkey's already brining. I'll come straight from morning service at New Hope. Save me a seat by the window, Mama.
Mac, greens, and a pound cake. The kids are so excited to see Uncle Shannon. Jaylen wants you to time his sprints in the yard again lol.
Drinks and ice handled. Pulling for a clean Iron Bowl rewatch after dinner. Roll Tide.
Men, first Sunday rehearsal is 9 AM before service. We're adding 'My Tribute.' Tenors get here at 8:45 to warm up with Brother Perry.
Tenors I'll have us warmed up. Bring your folders and your spirit. Let's give the Lord our best this Sunday.
Blessings, brothers. The congregation needed that sound last week. Keep showing up. New Hope is grateful for this ministry.
Shannon your 7 AM new-patient eval rescheduled to 7:30. Otherwise the morning block is full through 1:30. Coffee's on.
Thanks Monica. I'll be in by 6:45 to chart from yesterday. Tell the 8 AM ACL I want to see the new single-leg hop and balance scores before we progress him.
Good call holding him until the LSI clears 90. Let's review the adolescent cases together at lunch. Solid work this week, Shannon.
Film from the opener is uploaded. Devon, Trey, Marcus — watch your starts tonight and tell me one thing you'd fix. We review at practice tomorrow.
I came up too early again on the 400 start. 49.8 though Coach! First time under 50. Couldn't have done it without you.
49.8 is real running Trey. Now we hunt the 48s. Stay patient out of the blocks and trust your speed-endurance. Proud of you.
Long run tomorrow 7 AM at the Crestwood South trailhead. Easy 8 to 10, conversational pace. Headlamps if you're coming early. Coffee after at my place.
In for 10. Saving the coffee promise for the receipts. Bringing the good beans this time since yours is weak, Coach.
Devon's unofficial visit is Dec 5. I'm driving. Gloria, I'll have him back by 8. Coach Ellis from South Alabama is meeting us on campus.
Thank you Shannon. I trust you with my boy more than anybody. Send me a picture when y'all get there. Praying over this whole process.
Looking forward to it, Coach Perry. We'll show Devon around and talk through what a track scholarship here would look like. Drive safe.
Lake Purdy Saturday — dawn, before it gets hot. Crappie should be biting. (Apr 01)
Bring the light rods and the green tackle box. (Apr 01)
Bus for the Oak Mountain XC invite leaves Crestwood 6:45 sharp. (Apr 02)
Your daddy's whistle still in the bag? Good. Coach like he did. (Apr 02)
Church picnic the 12th, they want the men's choir on two songs. (Apr 03)
Boat's cleaned and the trolling motor's tuned, we're set. (Apr 03)
Weather calm this weekend, water should be flat by dawn. (Apr 05)
Keisha said you ran the whole loop under 40. Showing off, nephew. (Apr 05)
Fixed that Weber grate, come grab it in Ensley. (Apr 05)
Coffee's on me, you bring the tackle. Miss your daddy today. (Apr 05)
Practice plan's set for tomorrow, blocks then 150s. (Apr 06)
Devon's reel is cut, sending to the D1 coaches this week. (Apr 06)
